title: rubus neoserpens
intro: Rubus neoserpens, also known as New Zealand wineberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus neoserpens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. Rubus neoserpens can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often consumed as a supplement to support overall health and well-being.
